title: Origins Power Expansion
description: An expansion library for the power and action system within Origins
body:
[![](https://ars.guide/banner.gif)](https://jarva.bloom.host/) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/LICENSE-LGPL--3.0-fe7d37?style=for-the-badge) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-6A7EC2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=7389D8) ](https://discord.gg/TAVnu2xqrR) Fabric Version Requires: * [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) * [Architectury API (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-fabric) Forge Version Requires: * [Origins - Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-forge) * [Architectury API (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-forge) This mod exposes additional powers, actions and keybinds to be used inside of Origins datapacks.
The keybinds added by this mod are fully compatible with Extra Keybinds and will disable themselves if Extra Keybinds is found.
[Documentation](https://origins-power-expansion.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
